title: ELECLAND 24 Pcs Gingerbread Man and Candy Cane Lollipop Hanging Ornaments for Christmas Tree Decorations, Xmas Holiday Party Favors
features: Package includes: 12 pieces of gingerbread man ornaments and 12 pieces of candy cane lollipop ornaments for Christmas hanging decorations.
Product size: each gingerbread man is about 7cm×5cm / 2.75"×1.97" ,candy cane and lollipop are about 12cm/4.72" long, and the spiral is about 16cm/6.3" long.
Material: the gingerbread man is made of PVC plastic, and the candy hanging decoration is made of PS plastic, which is very durable and can be stored for next year’s Christmas decorations.

Christmas theme: these gingerbread men, candy canes, and lollipops are just like real, very suitable for the theme of Christmas. As Christmas decorations, they can set off the festive atmosphere very well.
Multiple usage: these ornaments are bright in colors, suitable for decorating Christmas trees, Christmas wreaths, or other Christmas decoration crafts.
description: Product description Christmas Ornament Decorations - Perfect for Christmas trees decoration and other crafts. Specifications: Material: PVC and PS plastic Color: as picture shown Size:gingerbread man is about 7cm×5cm / 2.75"×1.97"; candy cane and lollipop are about 12cm/4.72" long; candy spiral is about 16cm/6.3" long.
